name: v2_storytelling
description: Narrative arc with beginning, middle, and resolution
content: Generate a LinkedIn post that tells a compelling story with a clear narrative arc. Start with a hook that sets the scene, build tension through the middle section, and resolve with a key insight or lesson. Use flowing sentences that naturally progress the story forward. The # separator marks transitions between story beats. Each section should feel like a natural continuation, not a checklist item. Make the reader invested in the outcome before revealing the payoff.

metadata.target_audience: Professionals who value depth and insight
